扩展方向

插件开发指南

On this page

AstrBot Extension Directions ​

1. More Provider Support ​

1.1 Local Models ​

  • Ollama (local LLM)
  • LM Studio
  • Jan (local inference)

1.2 Chinese Models ​

  • 智谱 GLM (zhipuai)
  • 百度 ERNIE (qianfan)
  • 讯飞 Spark
  • 腾讯 Hunyuan

1.3 Reasoning Models ​

  • OpenAI o1/o3
  • Claude 3.5 Sonnet
  • Gemini 2.0 Flash Thinking

2. Plugin Marketplace ​

2.1 Distribution ​

  • Host plugins on GitHub/Gitee
  • Plugin registry API
  • One-click install from dashboard

2.2 Plugin Review ​

  • Automated security scan
  • Manual review process
  • Version compatibility check

2.3 Monetization ​

  • Premium plugins
  • Usage-based billing
  • Developer revenue share

3. Multi-Agent Collaboration ​

3.1 Agent Types ​

  • Coordinator Agent (task decomposition)
  • Specialist Agents (domain expertise)
  • Critic Agent (quality assurance)

3.2 Communication ​

  • Shared context pool
  • Message passing protocol
  • Result aggregation

3.3 Use Cases ​

  • Complex research tasks
  • Code generation + review
  • Multi-document analysis

4. Enhanced Computer Use ​

4.1 Browser Automation ​

  • Headless browser control
  • Multi-page workflows
  • Screenshot + OCR

4.2 Desktop Integration ​

  • Cross-platform automation
  • File system operations
  • System tray integration

4.3 Mobile Support ​

  • Android automation (ADB)
  • iOS automation (XCUITest)
  • Cross-device workflows

5. Knowledge Base Enhancements ​

5.1 Retrieval ​

  • Hybrid search (dense + sparse)
  • Reranking models
  • Query expansion

5.2 Knowledge Sources ​

  • Notion integration
  • Obsidian vault sync
  • Confluence connector

5.3 Memory ​

  • Long-term episodic memory
  • Preference learning
  • Context summarization

6. Platform Expansions ​

6.1 Social Platforms ​

  • WhatsApp
  • Line
  • Slack (enterprise)

6.2 Enterprise ​

  • DingTalk
  • Feishu (Lark)
  • Microsoft Teams

7. Development Tools ​

7.1 IDE Plugin ​

  • VSCode extension
  • IntelliJ plugin
  • Debug console

7.2 Testing ​

  • Plugin testing framework
  • Platform adapter mock
  • Integration test suite

8. Security & Compliance ​

8.1 Enterprise Features ​

  • SSO/SAML authentication
  • Audit logging
  • Data residency

8.2 Safety ​

  • Content filtering
  • Prompt injection detection
  • Rate limiting per user

9. Deployment Options ​

9.1 Cloud Services ​

  • AWS marketplace
  • Azure marketplace
  • Railway/Render

9.2 Edge Computing ​

  • Raspberry Pi support
  • NVIDIA Jetson
  • IoT gateway

10. Open Questions ​

  1. Plugin API versioning strategy?
  2. How to handle plugin dependencies?
  3. Multi-tenant architecture for enterprise?
  4. Model-agnostic tool definitions?
  5. Cross-platform conversation continuity?
